title: ライブはコーレスが命☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Heya! D'ya think you could watch me perform for
a sec? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm blindsided by Smart Falcon's sudden sweet
talk and find myself dazedly agreeing to be her
sole audience member.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Here I am with my trademark shiny, chestnut
hair! ☆ I'm everyone's adorable Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The name's Smart Falcon, but call me Falco,
'kaaay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you've all been waiting for my signature
chant! ☆ When I call out, make sure to answer
loud and clear with "Falco"!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Fa-Fa-Fa-Faaaaa... Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, someone's a little shy today. Let's try that
again!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Fa-Fa-Fa-Faaaaa... Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! Thank you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! It feels so awesome when the audience
answers back! While we're at it, I'm gonna make
up some longer cheers!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"You and me! Who's pretty?" "Faaal-cooooo!"
"Who's the most radiant Umadol?"
"Faaal-cooooo!"

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: How's that sound? Squee! I'm a genius!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've gotta write this down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I later hear rumors that Smart Falcon was spotted
in the library furiously scribbling in her notebook.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're not allowed to feel embarrassed at my
concerts! C'mon, just keep at it until you shake
off your shyness!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll get things nice and hyped up, so muster up
your courage and cheer along with me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Here I go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's creative ingenuity and enthusiasm
does wonders, and before I know it, I find myself
cheering along with her.
